author: avinash-sr
name: SP1024 Linear-Attention Hybrid + Late QAT + Hessian GPTQ
blurb: 12L/512d hybrid model alternating GQA softmax attention with a chunked gated linear-time mixer on SP1024 tokens; trained with Muon + AdamW + trapezoidal LR + SWA + late int6 QAT; exported with Hessian-aware per-row GPTQ (int6 matrices, int7 embeddings) and Brotli-11 compression; sliding-window eval at stride 64.
